page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a clock speed of 3.1 GHz. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate average single-core capabilities but weaker multi-core scaling. The processor achieves a single-core Geekbench score of 1245.0 and a stress-ng single-core score of 1432.58, both falling in the average tier. However, multi-core benchmarks, such as the Geekbench multi-core score of 2760.0 and the Passmark CPU score of 4655.05, are positioned in the weaker tier. Memory bandwidth is also relatively low, with uncached large-block read speeds at 26.35 GB/sec and write speeds at 22.75 GB/sec.

Given the dedicated CPU allocation and average single-threaded performance, this instance is suited for workloads that do not require intensive parallel processing or high memory throughput. Appropriate applications include lightweight web serving, basic text processing, and small-scale single-threaded tasks. The lack of local storage and lower multi-core performance represent key tradeoffs, making it less suitable for heavy database operations or complex multi-threaded compilations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8269CY x86_64 processor clocked at 3.1 GHz, paired with 16.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmark data reveals average single-core performance, with a Geekbench single-core score of 1245.0, contrasted by weaker multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics. With a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources without heavy parallel processing demands. It is best suited for lightweight web serving, text processing, and basic single-threaded applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg6.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 16 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, offering balanced single-core performance for basic workloads.

tagline: A dedicated four-core virtual server with balanced memory allocation for single-threaded tasks and lightweight general-purpose workloads.

16.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core
Average single-core performance suitable for single-threaded applications
Baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps without local storage or GPUs
Well-suited for lightweight web serving, text processing, and basic utility tasks
